name: China ↔ Taiwan
summary: Taiwan Strait contingency. Major Taiwanese ASes maintain direct adjacency to PRC state-operated transit (China Telecom, Unicom, Mobile) — providing immediate intercept and route-hijack capability if Beijing chose to weaponize it.

top_neighbours.holder: HINETUSA HiNet Service Center in U.S.A
TAIFO-AS-TW Taiwan Intelligent Fiber Optic Network Co.

rationales.blackout: peer count drop of 356.5 indicates effective communications blackout
rationales.adversarial_transit: 3 Russian-routed path(s) observed in BGP samples
rationales.sorm_exposure: SORM-capable ASes (AS4134, AS58453, AS58453) on observed path → unencrypted traffic legally subject to interception
rationales.baseline: minimum BGP-security hygiene applicable to every operator
